characters.name: Papa Frost
characters.description: Tall proud emperor penguin father with golden-orange chest patch, gentle warm eyes, devoted and protective
uniqueFeatures: TALLEST character — 25% taller than Mama Pearl, towers over chicks
Large GOLDEN-ORANGE chest patch shaped like a sunrise — his signature mark
THICK muscular build — broad barrel chest, strong wide flippers
Heavy brow ridge giving a determined, protective expression
Egg balanced on his feet — his defining prop in early scenes
characters.personality: Stoic and protective — stands very upright and perfectly still like a soldier on guard duty
characters.notLike: NOT slim or graceful like Mama Pearl, NOT fluffy or round like the chicks

characters.name: Mama Pearl
characters.description: Beautiful sleek emperor penguin mother with soft silver-white chest, gentle eyes, graceful and loving
uniqueFeatures: SLEEK slim build — visibly more slender and elegant than Papa
Soft SILVER-WHITE chest — clearly lighter and cooler-toned than Papa's gold
Longer, more pointed beak than Papa — refined and delicate
Graceful curved neck — carries her head at a gentle tilt
Feathers lie perfectly smooth and streamlined — a swimmer's body
characters.personality: Graceful and gentle — moves with flowing elegance, often tilts her head affectionately
characters.notLike: NOT broad or stocky like Papa Frost, NOT fluffy like the chicks

characters.name: Kaia
characters.description: Tiny adorable fluffy grey emperor penguin chick with enormous curious dark eyes and silver-grey down feathers
uniqueFeatures: SMALLEST character — only 30% the height of Papa Frost
Covered entirely in SILVER-GREY fluffy down — looks like a pom-pom
ENORMOUS round dark eyes — disproportionately large for her face
Teardrop-shaped body — widest at the bottom, tiny at the top
Neat, tidy fluff — no messy feathers, perfectly round silhouette
characters.personality: Curious and wide-eyed — always looking up with wonder, slightly timid stance
characters.notLike: NOT as round as Pip, NOT as messy-feathered as Pip, much SMALLER than adults

characters.name: Pip
characters.description: Slightly older and rounder fluffy grey penguin chick with a funny tuft of fluff sticking up on his head, mischievous and playful
uniqueFeatures: ROUNDER and CHUBBIER than Kaia — like a fluffy bowling ball
Signature TUFT of fluff sticking straight up on top of his head — his defining feature
Slightly TALLER than Kaia — older and bigger
Messy, ruffled down feathers — always looks a bit disheveled
Wider, goofier beak — slightly open as if about to laugh
characters.personality: Mischievous and bouncy — always leaning forward eagerly, never stands still
characters.notLike: NOT neat or tidy like Kaia, NOT as small as Kaia, NOT tall or elegant like adults

step3.styleDescription:
Pixar-quality 3D rendering. Smooth, rounded forms with subsurface scattering on skin. Expressive character animation with large soulful eyes. Rich saturated colors. Photorealistic textures but stylized proportions. Professional children's book illustration quality. Cinematic lighting with warm key light and cool fill.

Dramatic, expansive skies dominating the composition — towering clouds, vivid sunset/sunrise gradients, god rays breaking through cloud layers, atmospheric perspective pulling the eye to the horizon.

Close, warm framing. Shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh. Soft diffused lighting like a cozy room. Warm skin tones, gentle shadows. The feeling of being held close.
